summary: Adversarial review of 3 commits (release cleanup, heuristic fix, false-positive fix). Found 2 critical issues (vague/substring keywords in patterns) and 1 warning (overly common infra keywords), all fixed and tested. 1681/1681 tests pass, typecheck clean. No issues affect directive-branch-lifecycle change — all findings were in the cleave assessment subsystem.

constraints: Pattern keywords must not include terms that appear in the vague-penalty list (improve, better, fix issues, make it, update)
Infrastructure pattern keywords should avoid domain-generic nouns (model, memory, context, status) that would match most directives in an AI-tooling codebase
